essence: Ensures workplaces are safe, compliant, and free from hazards through inspections, training, and risk management.

identity.title: Health & Safety Officer
identity.summary: Monitors workplace safety, conducts risk assessments, investigates incidents, and ensures compliance with health and safety regulations.

salary.notes: Senior H&S managers or specialists in high‑risk industries can exceed £65k–£85k+.

qualifications: Ability to conduct risk assessments and inspections
Understanding of incident investigation and reporting

lifestyle.description: Health and safety officers work across offices, construction sites, warehouses, and industrial facilities. They inspect workplaces, identify hazards, train staff, and ensure compliance with regulations. The role suits individuals who enjoy investigative work, communication, and improving workplace wellbeing.

habits: Writes clear risk assessments and reports
